MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Moriarty of Cesari Werner & Moriarty, 391-1113, appearing for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS NELSON FONG and SARAH FONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT BASED ON ANOTHER PENDING ACTION AND UNKNOWN TIME OF INJURY. Case is stayed pending resolution of case 619228. Thereafter, plaintiff may amend complaint if case not resolved. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
